description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a long, rectangular footprint and a prominent gable roof covered in dark, overlapping shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontally arranged wooden planks, giving it a weathered, natural appearance. The front and rear facades each feature a large, central rectangular doorway, but no visible windows. The roof has a significant overhang, providing some shelter to the entrances and emphasizing the cabin's elongated form. The structure appears simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements or attached porches. Its robust construction and lack of ornamentation suggest a practical design suited for rural or forested environments.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden cabin with a dark gable roof and central doorways on both ends, featuring no visible windows or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, central rectangular doorway, and wood plank exterior with no windows.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the long, dark shingled gable roof and the rectangular footprint of the cabin.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a central doorway and wood plank siding, also lacking windows.
description_view_3: Another top-down view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the roof's length and shingle pattern.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with significant overhang, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; facades are solid wood planks
attribute_door_placement: Single large rectangular door centered on both the front and rear facades
